info.description: This is the API server for AquaSense TDS application.
info.title: AquaSense Backend API

get.summary: Get dashboard summary for a specific user (admin only)
Get crop suggestions based on TDS value
Get soil moisture history for analytics

parameters.description: Sensor ID (defaults to farm's active sensor)
parameters.name: sensor_id

post.summary: Social login with Google or Apple
Link a sensor to user's farm

get.summary: Get all sensor nodes for current user

post.summary: Add a new sensor node (max 5 per user)

put.summary: Set a node as active (used in dashboard)

get.summary: Get nearby sensors sorted by distance

active_sensor_id.description: FK → sensors: sensor ที่ Dashboard ใช้งานอยู่

user_id.description: FK → users: ระบุว่า farm นี้เป็นของ user ไหน

display_name.description: optional: "สมชาย ใจดี" → split into first/last
